prompt: Using the CodeGrapher MCP server, produce a Mermaid flowchart LR data-flow diagram for the Broker sub-system of the stress-test codebase. Entry point: broker/main.cc. Include all key symbols in the internal call chain (on_msg_received through dispatch_event), data types consumed/produced, and annotate relay:true edges. Use only MCP tools — do NOT read source files. Save diagram to outputs/skill_output.md and tool call log to outputs/tool_calls.json.
assertions: Diagram contains RoutingKey or Header type node
Tool call log exists and is non-empty
